steps.title: Identify the cause and result
steps.content: Modern planes are described as having sleeker, more streamlined bodies than the Wright Flyer. The next sentence says they are more aerodynamic, which follows as a result of that design difference.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: A signals contradiction, C signals something true despite another fact, and D signals the final item in a sequence. The needed transition marks the aerodynamic improvement as the effect of sleeker bodies. The answer is B.
